phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the next showing starts
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence la prochaine séance ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR koh-MAHNSS lah proh-SHEN say-AHNSS
phrases.cultural_note: Panorama XXL is an immersive panoramic experience.

responses.english: The next showing is in twenty minutes.
responses.phonetic: lah proh-SHEN say-AHNSS eh dahn VAHN mee-NOOT
responses.french: La prochaine séance est dans vingt minutes.

phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut réserver des billets en ligne à l'avance ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn PUH ray-zair-VAY day bee-YAY ahn LEEN-yuh ah lah-VAHNS
phrases.cultural_note: Online booking is available and recommended for summer weekends when queues can be long. The experience inside lasts about 45 minutes and is particularly popular with families and school groups.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about accessibility for visitors with reduced mobility
phrases.text_local: Le Panorama XXL est-il accessible aux personnes à mobilité réduite ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh pah-noh-RAH-mah ex-ex-EL eh-TEEL ak-ses-EEBL oh pair-SON ah moh-bee-lee-TAY ray-DWEET
phrases.cultural_note: The building is fully accessible, with a lift to the viewing platform and ramps throughout. The immersive format means the experience is equally rich at ground level.

responses.phonetic: wee eel ee ah uhn ah-sahn-SUR
responses.french: Oui, il y a un ascenseur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café on site
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a un café sur place ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah uhn kah-FAY soor PLAHSS
phrases.cultural_note: Many cultural venues in Rouen have small cafés.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether there is a café on site
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un café ou un espace de restauration dans le bâtiment ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn kah-FAY oo uhn es-PAHSS duh res-toh-rah-SYOHN dahn luh bah-tee-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: Panorama XXL has a small refreshments area in the lobby. Given its location slightly east of the historic centre, it makes sense to combine a visit with the nearby Île Lacroix for a riverside walk.
